title: "Christ Jesus Came Into The World To Save Sinners" I Timothy 1:12-17

notes.introduction: An exposition of 1 Timothy 1:12-17 on Paul's testimony of receiving mercy, grace, and salvation, set against the backdrop of Sanctity of Life Sunday and the claim that the value of human life rests on the truths of creation, God's existence, and redemption at Calvary.

sections.heading: Sanctity of Life and God's Word
Atheism, Evolution, and the Value of Life
Calvary and the Worth of Human Life
What Paul Received: Mercy, Grace, Salvation, Purpose
What Paul Remembered: His Life Before Salvation
How Paul Rejoiced: Names Written in Heaven
